sentence: Sonsei enters last. Rizzonance arrived without him.

wombos.definition: A respectable friend or mentor figure — someone you look up to who also moves with the energy of a 'son.' The authoritative counterpart to a sonbling.
wombos.example: My sonsei walked in and immediately commanded the whole room.

wombos.definition: The magnetic, irresistible frequency someone gives off — the resonance of their rizz. When someone's charm is so strong it vibrates through an entire room.
